name: Vehicle Control
description: Differential-drive vehicle control via ROS Twist messages

subcategory_hints.Vehicle: Use Move Robot for simple velocity commands. Use Stop Robot to halt all movement. Use Publish Twist for advanced custom topic control.

blocks.ai_description: Publish a Twist message with linear and angular velocity to a custom ROS topic.

definition.tooltip: Publish a geometry_msgs/Twist message to a specified topic.

blocks.ai_description: Move the robot with specified linear (forward/back) and angular (turn) velocities.

definition.message0: Move Robot  Linear X %1  Angular Z %2
definition.tooltip: Moves the robot with specified linear and angular velocities.
